danger_signals.visual_form: Stars visually intensify/expand in system view; planetary destruction indicators
danger_signals.meaning: Environmental catastrophe; entire star systems becoming uninhabitable; ancient race threat manifestation

danger_signals.visual_form: Alien ship approaches with aggressive scan pattern; weapon lock indicators on HUD
danger_signals.meaning: Combat imminent; faction or species hostile to player crew

danger_signals.visual_form: Science officer scan shows gravity reading >8.0g; visual terrain appearance shows extreme pressure effects
danger_signals.meaning: Ship destruction if landing attempted; planetary hazard

danger_signals.visual_form: Destructive fleet signature; coordinated swarm behavior on sensors
danger_signals.meaning: Extreme danger; hive-mind coordinated hostility; civilization-level threat

danger_signals.visual_form: Endurium (fuel crystal) inventory diminishes; HUD warnings on remaining range
danger_signals.meaning: Resource scarcity; stranding risk in deep space

danger_signals.visual_form: Insectoid ships intercept trajectory; demand signal; threatening posture
danger_signals.meaning: Territorial faction; bribery demand or combat threat

safety_signals.visual_form: Space station Arth in view; docking interface available; blue safe-zone indicator
safety_signals.meaning: Human safe haven; trading, repair, crew recruitment available; world state baseline

safety_signals.visual_form: Pacifistic plant-race ship signature; non-aggressive scan pattern; green diplomatic hail
safety_signals.meaning: Peaceful faction; low combat risk; potential trade or alliance

safety_signals.visual_form: Science officer analysis shows optimal temperature/gravity/atmosphere; green habitability markers
safety_signals.meaning: Colonization opportunity; economic resource; safe landing zone exists

safety_signals.visual_form: Coordinate pair markers on star map; blue instantaneous travel conduits
safety_signals.meaning: Safe, fuel-efficient fast travel; navigation aid reducing isolation

safety_signals.visual_form: Alien ship with passive scan; communications channel open; green alliance indicator
safety_signals.meaning: Diplomatic engagement possible; trade or crew recruitment available

safety_signals.visual_form: Crew roster shows high skill levels across positions; training progress bars elevated
safety_signals.meaning: Ship capability increase; reduced danger from unknown situations

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Arth planetary symbol; Starport orbital station
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Subterranean planet with radiation legacy; orbital trading hub; baseline civilization

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Large insect visual design; swarm patrol patterns
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Aggressive interceptor formation; bribe demand hails
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Territorial space sectors; demand bribes from violating ships; xenophobic boundary markers

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Old Empire technological remnants; android physiology
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Remnants of ancient Old Empire; distributed throughout galaxy; technological artifacts

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Plant-based organic visual design; growth patterns
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Pacifistic cultural markers; safe-space indicators; diplomatic-first communication

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Mercantilist aggression posture; wealth-seeking scan patterns
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Profit-driven space sectors; commercial dominance markers

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Amorphous blob physiology; cowardice behavioral tells
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Flee patterns on sensor; panic responses
Hostile to 'air-breathers'; zealot attack patterns; ideological aggression markers

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Destructive swarm formation; hive-mind coordination visual
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Coordinated multi-ship attack formation; relentless pursuit patterns; civilization threat level
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Destructive advance markers; civilizational hazard zones; expanding threat territories

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Starport dominates visual; nearby systems accessible; blue safe-zone emphasis; low alien contact
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Crew recruitment available; ship upgrades limited; exploration cautious; diplomatic overtures frequent

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Star map fills with discovered systems; faction territories become visually distinct; resource nodes scattered; alien encounter frequency increases
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Combat encounters diversify by faction; trading routes establish; colonization targets identified; crew specialization deepens

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Multiple stars show flaring/expansion effects; system destruction markers spread; environmental red warnings increase; ancient race artifacts appear
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Alien factions show distress/alliance-seeking behavior; combat intensity escalates; diplomatic urgency increases; colony viability threatened

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Alien ruins appear on planets; mysterious artifact signatures; star flaring origin points; reality-warping visual effects
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: All factions show heightened alert status; coordinated threat response; communication pattern shifts toward existential discussion

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Fuel crystal inventory visually depletes; HUD range-warning colors shift to orange/red; distance-to-safe-point emphasized
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Navigation becomes cautious; Continuum Flux network usage increases; risk-avoidance behavior dominates; crew stress indicators rise

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Crew skill bars visually fill; HUD detection range expands; scan resolution increases; ship defense indicators strengthen
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Aggressive exploration increases; deeper alien scanning possible; combat confidence rises; diplomatic leverage improves

environmental_storytelling.example: Science officer scan reveals temperature, gravity, chemistry as direct world-state indicators; habitable planets visually stand out with green habitability markers; radiation-damaged planets tell Arth's history
Veloxi space marked by repeated bribe demands and insectoid patrol patterns; Gazurtoid regions show religious hostility markers; Elowan space marked by peaceful green indicators

Ruins scattered across planets signal ancient civilization presence; accumulation of ruins in certain regions suggests Old Empire center of gravity; ruin concentration near flaring stars hints at catastrophe cause
Flaring stars visually intensify/expand in system view; normal stars appear stable; dying stars show visual degradation; this direct visual encoding communicates galactic health

Arming weapons/shields heavily influences alien reactions; communication style variants (aggressive, diplomatic, neutral) receive different faction responses; crew composition signals intent to aliens

Mercator projection map shows topography; periodic scans reveal hidden mineral deposits, lifeforms, ruins; terrain difficulty communicates world hostility; visual desolation vs. abundance tells planetary narrative
Crew skill bars fill visibly; science officer skill increase directly expands detection range and information depth; this visual feedback communicates growing mastery of galaxy complexity

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Intercept trajectory; initiate bribe demand hail; assume threatening posture unless compensated; show swarm coordination
Maintain distance; initiate friendly scan; respond positively to diplomatic hails; offer trade opportunities; never engage in aggression
Scan for valuable cargo; initiate mercenary-style communication; respond to profit incentives; show interest in lucrative trades
Flee from superior forces; panic responses on sensor; avoid combat; seek distance; show cowardice behavioral patterns
Attack air-breathing species on sight; religious zealot aggression patterns; refuse diplomatic engagement with infidels; show coordinated zealot formation
Move in synchronized swarm formations; attack with relentless coordination; show civilizational threat-level aggression; expand destructively through systems; never show individual variation
Science officer detects aliens at greater range; navigation accuracy improves; combat effectiveness scales with crew specialization; diplomatic options expand
Visual intensification of star appearance; planetary destruction manifestation; all inhabitants flee or show distress signals; system becomes uninhabitable zone

notes: Starflight Genesis (1991) uses a sophisticated multi-layered visual communication system. The core paradigm is 'alien species as visual faction identifier'—each of the eight space-faring races has distinct visual markers, behavioral signatures, and territorial indicators. The game communicates world-state primarily through: (1) Star map visual encoding (flaring stars = crisis; normal stars = stability), (2) Planetary scan attributes (habitability markers; radiation legacy), (3) Alien encounter posture (weapons armed vs. shields raised vs. hails sent), (4) Crew skill UI (direct visual feedback on capability escalation), and (5) Faction territory markers (Veloxi space = bribe demand zones; Elowan space = peaceful green indicators). Danger signals are communicated through color intensity, scan pattern aggression, and HUD warning states. The two-tier threat system (immediate combat danger vs. existential star-flaring crisis) creates layered storytelling: surface exploration dangers (high-gravity planets, hostile ships) vs. deep-lore threat (ancient race causing universal catastrophe). Environmental storytelling leverages the 270-system / 800-planet scale to create spatial narratives—ruin distributions, faction territorial clustering, and radiation/habitability gradients all communicate political and historical context without explicit exposition.
